workers.title: MAIN CONTROL | OPERATOR
workers.endMarker: [MAIN CONTROL] MAIN CONTROL | OPERATOR :: END OF CHAT
workers.role: Primary operator terminal for runtime spine commands, human direction, and final coordination.
allowedActions: Check repo status and review validator output
Route approved work to the correct worker lane
Paste approved git commands with explicit file paths
blockedActions: No live trading, broker, OANDA, API key, or secret actions
No startup tasks or scheduled tasks
No destructive cleanup
No git add .

workers.title: 🛠 BUILDER
workers.role: Focused build worker for approved repo-scoped implementation work.
allowedActions: Report files created, changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state
blockedActions: No protected root governance edits unless explicitly approved
No dashboard or Trading Lab changes unless scoped
No broad commits or pushes
No secrets or credential handling

workers.title: CODEX 1 - WORKERS
workers.role: Presentation marker for Codex Worker 1. Ownership must resolve through automation/orchestration/workers/AIOS_WORKER_PROFILES.json and the active packet.
allowedActions: Prefer worker registry and ownership governance tasks
Report files changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state
blockedActions: No authority from this window marker alone
No active packet, approval inbox, runtime, scheduler, trading, broker, OANDA, API key, or secret actions
No staging, commits, pushes, merges, reset, clean, delete, or backup actions

allowedActions: Prefer assigned validator and schema files
Report files changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state

allowedActions: Report files changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state
blockedActions: No authority from this window marker alone

Report files changed, validation, git status, commit, and push state

workers.title: CLAUDE - INSPECTOR
workers.role: Review-only worker for architecture inspection, critique, risk review, and DRY_RUN refinement.
allowedActions: Review architecture, governance, and workflow risk
Recommend DRY_RUN refinements for operator approval
blockedActions: No file edits unless explicitly reassigned in an APPLY packet
No staging, commits, pushes, or merges
No approval mutation or queue mutation
No broker, OANDA, live trading, webhook, API key, or secret actions

workers.title: ✅ VALIDATOR
workers.role: Validation-only worker for checks, parser tests, and read-only verification.
allowedActions: Parse changed JSON or PowerShell files
Report PASS, WARN, or FAIL plainly
blockedActions: No file edits
No staging, commits, or pushes
No external app launches
No live trading or broker paths

workers.title: 📦 PACKETS
workers.role: Queue worker for workload packets, command packs, and next safe tasks.
allowedActions: Sort next work by runtime-spine value
blockedActions: No APPLY without approval
No random dashboard or tool expansion
No destructive cleanup
No broker or trading execution actions

workers.title: 📥 APPROVALS
workers.role: Decision worker for approvals, stop conditions, and user-controlled checkpoints.
allowedActions: Approve or reject exact APPLY scopes
Confirm explicit git add, commit, push, or PR steps
blockedActions: No silent APPLY
No implicit commits or pushes
No merge, delete, move, rename, reset, clean, or auth changes without direct approval

workers.title: 🩺 RECOVERY
workers.role: Recovery worker for diagnostics, failures, mismatches, and blocked states.
allowedActions: Mark UNKNOWN, MISMATCH, or INVALID DATA when evidence requires it
blockedActions: No destructive repair commands
No credential or security setting changes
No startup or scheduled task changes
No live trading paths

workers.title: ⏸ STANDBY
workers.role: Idle worker reserved for approved next tasks only.
allowedActions: Run read-only status checks when asked
blockedActions: No speculative edits
No autonomous cleanup
No staging, commits, pushes, or external launches
No broker or trading execution actions

workers.title: 💾 T9 BACKUP
workers.role: Snapshot worker for read-only repo copies to the T9_FOB drive. Active repo is never mutated.
allowedActions: Copy C:\Dev\Ai.Os to a timestamped D:\T9_FOB snapshot
Report source data size, copied data size, and verification result
blockedActions: No edits, staging, commits, or pushes to the active repo
No destructive cleanup or deletion of prior snapshots
No startup or scheduled task changes
No broker, OANDA, live trading, API key, or secret actions
